title: hieracium pallidum subsp. subrupicola
intro: Hieracium pallidum subsp. subrupicola, also known as a type of Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hieracium pallidum subsp. subrupicola include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
